text: “Urban area” means the area encompassed within the city limits of a city whose population is 15,000 or more.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.315 — “Urban area” defined.

“Urban area” means the area encompassed within the city limits of a city whose population is 15,000 or more.

subsections.text: “Urban area” means the area encompassed within the city limits of a city whose population is 15,000 or more.
